posts.author: bmck097 (Brittany)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The Required Column feature is a welcome addition - I’m just disappointed to see that once again we have a great new feature that isn’t compatible with subitems. I’m really hoping this is coming soon - until then, it’s as if only half a feature was released.

What are you trying to achieve

I’d really like to see this feature released in its full form.
